item.title: Day 319: of cheeseburgers I want inside of me
item.description: C- Roll Chili Cheese Burger Two 4oz Beef Smash Patties, Pimento Cheese, Diced Onions, Cooper’s Chili, Stacked On A Cinnamon Roll Bun With Homemade Icing From Lucy Cooper's Texas Ice House In San Antonio, Texas Thank You @sarabear For This Crazy Burger Submission 10/10 Previous Day 318: https://imgur.com/gallery/IGQR4uZ MESSAGE ME BURGER PICS OR YOUR FAVORITE BURGER SPOTS! Map of all burger spots that are available on yelp! Big thanks to @OhBoyDoIHaveNews4U for this. Link to his post and map https://imgur.com/gallery/vcObDuD @CrisprCAS Daily Tag It's A Midwest Thing

item.title: A few good men.
item.description: Taken in January 2022. All three of these gents are gone now. Live, laugh, and live might sound cliché. Even so, those are wise words. *FP Edit - Correction: Gil tweeted this pic in January. Not sure when it was taken, but yeah it’s a sad day. **live, laugh, love ***free advice - Life is short. Live it up. Love it up. Laugh it up. Be a good person.

item.title: It's been 500 days!!!
item.description: For those of you unfamiliar with the story, back in Sept 2020 our AG was driving home late one night from a function when he struck and killed a citizen walking along the side of the road. He claimed that he thought he hit a deer! Even so he didn't even stop to investigate what he could have possibly hit, he just kept going. The next day when he reported it they investigated the car and found the man's glasses in the back seat as he had hit him hard enough to have his face go through the windshield. The whole story of how we got here today is painful and after our Gov Kristi Noem got involved it just got messier. I personally believe he should be behind bars for vehicular manslaughter and that he should have had to sit the entire 500 days leading to this, however I really hope this helps bring some relief and closure to our corrupt state. I know the victims family will never have full closure and it won't bring Joseph Boevers back but I hope it brings them some peace. Link for reference: https://www.google.com/amp/s/amp.cnn.com/cnn/2022/04/12/politics/jason-ravnsborg-south-dakota-impeachment/index.html
item.dc:creator: mikhail7219

item.title: It's the single most important issue
item.dc:creator: JayAdan
